---
title: 'Ketos Creative'
date: '2015-11-15T21:21:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Creatives'' Space'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '7876233361483942976'
blogger_filename: '/2015/11/ketos-creative.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatives_ Space/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ketos-logo11-f9ca2ed46b96.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><span style="background-color: black; color: black;"></span></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ketos-410e6075bb4e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="133" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ketos-26471214e476.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
<br />
<h4>
<div>
Ketos Creative: Contact Information</div>
</h4>
Ketos Website:&nbsp;<a href="http://ketoscreative.com/" target="_blank">KetosCreative.com</a><br />
Address: 5500 N Tarrant Pkwy #128, Fort Worth, TX 76244<br />
Phone: (817) 514-3858<br />
Hours:<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>Sunday Closed</li>
<li>Monday 12:00 â€“ 8:30 PM</li>
<li>Tuesday 12:00 â€“ 8:30 PM</li>
<li>Wednesday 12:00 â€“ 8:30 PM</li>
<li>Thursday 9:00 AM â€“ 8:30 PM</li>
<li>Friday 12:00 â€“ 5:30 PM</li>
<li>Saturday Closed</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
Ketos Creative is a professional Creative Services and Creative Training Academy.<br />
<br />
As the front page of their website promotes:<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>We live to create</li>
<li>We love to teach</li>
<li>We are Ketos Creative</li>
</ul>
<br />
The building is located in a small parking lot on N.&nbsp;Tarrant&nbsp;parkway, right next to Slim Chickens. As you walk in the front door, you are greeted by a small waiting area and front office. You can them make your way down the hallways to the various classrooms and work areas. Just beyond the front office is a room that is used for Little Harmonies (from babies to age seven).<br />
<br />
Down the hall to the left is a recording studio, complete with quiet rooms for individual recordings. To the right is a larger performance room, with audience area.<br />
<br />
Further down the hall, to the left, is the drum room. Five student drum kits, around a sixth teachers drum kit are decked out with the full compliment. Specially designed quiet heads allow the students to get full feel and tone without full sound levels. Six can play in this room quite comfortably without hurting each others ears, or interrupting the other rooms.<br />
<br />
Finally, down the hall to the right is a piano room, where multiple keyboards surround the teachers keyboard, and room for guitar lessons as well.<br />
<br />
Academy<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Services<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
